message:
fix(pipeline): propagate failed status to skipped transitive deps

When a step is skipped due to a failed dependency, it was not being
marked as failed in the dependency graph. This caused transitive
dependents to attempt execution instead of being skipped.

Example: A->B->C chain where A fails:
- Before: B skipped, but C would try to execute
- After: B skipped and marked failed, C also skipped

Added test TestDependencyGraph_TransitiveFailure to verify behavior.
